creator: dannyman@dannyland.org
text:
On Sun, Apr 12, 1998 at 01:31:57PM -0700, Brian Handy wrote:

> Hmmm...where'd it fetch the port from?  I just fetched it from the French
> site, (#2 in the MASTER_SITES list) and it worked fine.  If we've got
> different checksums at different sites, that's a very very bad thing.  Can
> you try it again, and if it's still bad note the delinquent site?  (I
> couldn't get to the first site on the list.)

Looks like uwm.edu ...

>> Checksum OK for lyx-0.12.0.tar.gz.

I will try the french site now. :)
